Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class ProgramConstant

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramVariable
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramConstant
All Implemented Interfaces:
Expression, ModelElement, ProgramElement, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, IProgramVariable, Operator, ProgramInLogic, Sorted, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, ParsableVariable, Sorted, SyntaxElement, TerminalSyntaxElement, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
public final class ProgramConstant extends ProgramVariable
This class represents currently only static final fields initialised with a compile time constant. These fields cannot occur on the left side of an update.

  • Method Details

    • getCompileTimeConstant

      public Literal getCompileTimeConstant()
      Returns:
      the value of the initializer as a literal, if this variable is a compile-time constant, null otherwise
